en: I had it all. I had a stairwell that was very decent, a wardrobe that was getting very respectable.
I was close to being complete.
Shit, man, now it's all gone. All gone.
All gone. Do you know what a duvet is?
Comfort. It's a blanket. Just a blanket.
Now, why do guys like you and I know what a duvet is?
ko: 그런데 왜 우리 같은 남자들이 이불이 뭔지 아는 걸까?

en: Is this essential to our survival? In the hunter-gatherer sense of the word?
We're, uh, you know, consumers. Right.
We are consumers. We are byproducts of a lifestyle obsession.
Murder, crime, poverty, these things don't concern me.
What concerns me are celebrity magazines, television with 500 channels,
some guy's name on my underwear, Rogaine, Viagra, Olestra. Martha Stewart.
ko: 내 속옷에 적힌 어떤 남자의 이름.

en: Fuck Martha Stewart. Martha's polishing the brass on the Titanic.
